'''ngakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yare|yare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yare|yare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngakate|ngakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngakatesher|ngakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatesherĂ«m|ngakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngakatero|ngakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngakateshĂ«|ngakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakateshĂ«m|ngakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingakatero|gokingakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingakateshĂ«|gokingakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakateshĂ«m|gokingakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongakankerom|gongakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongakankeshĂ«|gongakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakankeshĂ«m|gongakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongakankeya|gongakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngakaterom|ngakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatemu|ngakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngakateya|ngakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingakaterom|gokingakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakatemu|gokingakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingakateya|gokingakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngakakate|ngakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngakakatesher|ngakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakakatesherĂ«m|ngakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngakakatero|ngakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngakakateshĂ«|ngakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakakateshĂ«m|ngakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingakakatero|gokingakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingakakateshĂ«|gokingakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakakateshĂ«m|gokingakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongakakankerom|gongakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongakakankeshĂ«|gongakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakakankeshĂ«m|gongakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongakakankeya|gongakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngakakaterom|ngakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakakatemu|ngakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngakakateya|ngakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingakakaterom|gokingakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakakatemu|gokingakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingakakateya|gokingakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠte|ngĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠtesher|ngĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠtero|ngĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠtero|gokingĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠterom|ngĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠtemu|ngĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠkĂŠteya|ngĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠterom|gokingĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠkĂŠteya|gokingĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafkafte|ngafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafkaftesher|ngafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafkaftesherĂ«m|ngafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafkaftero|ngafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafkafteshĂ«|ngafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafkafteshĂ«m|ngafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafkaftero|gokingafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafkafteshĂ«|gokingafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafkafteshĂ«m|gokingafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafkafnkerom|gongafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafkafnkeshĂ«|gongafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafkafnkeshĂ«m|gongafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafkafnkeya|gongafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafkafterom|ngafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafkaftemu|ngafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafkafteya|ngafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafkafterom|gokingafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafkaftemu|gokingafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafkafteya|gokingafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
